title: Rose Gold Foil Balloon Bouquet, 14 Pieces, 12 cm Inflated Size Party Decoration Balloons | Confetti, Mettalic & Star Heart Foil Balloon
features: Vibrant Colour Assortment: This bouquet contains 14 premium foil balloons in a variety of rose gold and confetti designs to add festive flair to any celebration.
Generous Size: Each balloon inflates to an impressive 30.48 cm diameter, creating an eye-catching centrepiece.
Versatile Uses: Suitable for birthdays, gender reveals, anniversaries, and more - these balloons elevate any joyous occasion.
Easy Assembly: Simply inflate with helium or air and arrange as desired for an instant decorative accent.
Quality Construction: Crafted from durable foil material to maintain their shape and vibrant hues.
description: Product description Bring a touch of joy and celebration to any gathering with our premium Bouquet of Party Foil Balloons. This vibrant assortment of 14 balloons in various colours is perfect for birthdays, gender reveals, and any festive occasion. When fully inflated, each balloon measures an impressive 30.48 cm, adding a delightful pop of colour and excitement. Whether you're decorating for a party or simply looking to brighten someone's day, this bouquet of balloons is sure to delight your guests and create lasting memories. Crafted with high-quality materials, these balloons are a fun and affordable way to add a touch of whimsy to your celebrations. Safety Warning No Warning For Children can be used under Adult supervision
